claims.summary: embedding_projection_matrix uses a fixed-seed LCG and should be verified for deterministic repeatability rather than unstable or context-dependent projection output.
ASTRID_CODEC_PROJECTION_EPOCH_ID must take precedence over codec_projection_epoch.json so an operator-reviewed epoch override wins persistence state.

projection_fingerprint and projection_stats need evidence for float-edge canonicalization and sensitivity/dead-zone behavior; changing the projection contract itself would be live semantic-lane authority.
